com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXSingleEndedCoresConstraint

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConstraint, IXPlugin

    public interface IXSingleEndedCoresConstraint
extends IXConstraint
    Custom Constraint - allows custom specification of whether the wires or shields of signals in a multicore should be terminated when they do not connect to a conenctor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean match(IXMulticore multicore, IXSignal signal, IXConnector connector, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.
      default boolean match(IXMulticore multicore, IXSignal signal, IXHole hole, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.
      default boolean match(IXMulticore multicore, IXSignal signal, IXRingTerminal ringTerminal, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.
      boolean match(IXSignal signal, IXConnector connector, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.
      default boolean match(IXSignal signal, IXHole hole, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.
      default boolean match(IXSignal signal, IXRingTerminal ringTerminal, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • match

        boolean match(IXSignal signal,
              IXConnector connector,
              IXDoDontResult result)
        Determine if constraint applies given these objects. If so, return a Do/Dont result specify whether to terminate or not
        Parameters:
        signal - - being considered
        connector - - being considered
        result - - determine if the signal should or should not be terminated Set when returning "true" result.
        Returns:
        boolean - Does the constraint apply to this specific set of objects?

      • match

        default boolean match(IXSignal signal,
                      IXRingTerminal ringTerminal,
                      IXDoDontResult result)
        Determine if constraint applies given these objects. If so, return a Do/Dont result specify whether to terminate or not
        Parameters:
        signal - - being considered
        ringTerminal - - being considered
        result - - determine if the signal should or should not be terminated Set when returning "true" result.
        Returns:
        boolean - Does the constraint apply to this specific set of objects? The defaut implementation returns false

      • match

        default boolean match(IXSignal signal,
                      IXHole hole,
                      IXDoDontResult result)
        Determine if constraint applies given these objects. If so, return a Do/Dont result specify whether to terminate or not
        Parameters:
        signal - - being considered
        hole - - being considered
        result - - determine if the signal should or should not be terminated Set when returning "true" result.
        Returns:
        boolean - Does the constraint apply to this specific set of objects? The defaut implementation returns false
